titleStmt.title: SII 37.165: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 165. (A.R. No. B 44 of 1939-40.) Naravakāṭpalle (hamlet of Oṇṭiniṭṭa), Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Āvulamāla on the eastern boundary of the village.

It records the several births and transmigrations of a certain (cows) Andanāla Kommaramma which lastly flourished in the house of Veyyāvula Māchi Reḍḍi of Chennūru Guḍūru. It also states that the heroine Nimatyamma the daughter of Māchireḍḍi talk her final stand to the north of the Rāmasvāmi temple at Oṇṭmiṭṭa. In characters of 17th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Aṁddanāla komaraṁmma para
vatāna vūrbhaṭiṁcca gōpā
la kṛṣṇaṁmma gōvādri koṁ
ḍḍagoḍugu baṭṭi sītaṁma
tōgūḍa śirigiri konna
stāna cēsi Ayōdhya
lō veliśi Amaraṁgga ko
marāvu ceṁnūru gūḍū
ra veyyāvula mācire
ḍḍi vāriṭṭa veliśinū
mācireḍḍi komāte vī
raperaṁṭṭālu nimityamma
jāgā viḍici vacci saṁbbi
ṭa nalagaṁbbaṁrāju kamī
sānavavoccivaṁṭṭimiṭṭa
rāmasvāmidēvaḷaniki vutta
rabhāgāna nilucunu .
Digital edition of SII 37.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
